label: media
definition: Root node for local media ontology

label: aqueous
definition: Liquid media where water is the primary phase

label: leachate
definition: Liquid that has percolated through material

label: runoff
definition: Water flowing over land after precipitation or release

label: blood
definition: Blood as a biological fluid medium

label: plasma
definition: Plasma as a biological fluid medium

label: serum
definition: Serum as a biological fluid medium

label: non-aqueous
definition: Liquid media where water is not the primary phase

label: solid
definition: Solid media state and routing group

label: tissue
definition: Tissue as a biological solid medium

label: feed
definition: Animal feed as an exposure medium

label: particulate matter
definition: Particulate matter treated as solid for routing

label: suspended solids
definition: Suspended solids treated as solid for routing

label: gas
definition: Gas media state with air routing

label: aerosol
definition: Aerosol routed with gas media pending mixed-phase evidence
